appraisal_events.evidence: « duc de Châtellerault était aussi froussard qu’imprudent »; reçu pour la première fois chez sa cousine; sous un faux incognito, il répondait seulement « I do not speak french » à l’huissier.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator locally belittles the duke by highlighting his comical cowardice and lack of social ease, despite his generosity.

status_effects.explanation: His fearful and awkward portrait under incognito makes him appear ridiculous and unsure of himself.
